query:
INSERT INTO feedback_reports (nodeNumber, reporterName, reportType, source, reportDate, blockRef, verdictTitle, verdictDetails, actionTitle, actionDetails, prescription, rawFeedback, status) VALUES 
(18, 'Khanh Huynh (Node 018)', 'beta_feedback', 'WhatsApp', '2026-03-23', 'Block402', 
 'Positive — Wants More Story and Choice', 
 'Node 018 (Marketing Intelligence, Henry Leong nephew) tested Explorer Mode and provided feedback requesting: (1) narrative prologue to set the scene before gameplay, (2) branching choice mechanics so decisions feel meaningful, (3) more DAVID personality in responses. Overall positive on concept and visual quality.',
 'Implement Prologue + Branching Dilemmas', 
 'Built narrative prologue page (The Last Human After Midnight) and 12 branching What Would You Do? dilemmas with DAVID responses and archetype tracking. Deployed 24 Mar 2026.',
 'Continue gathering beta feedback. Node 018 confirmed as Marketing Intelligence specialist (summa cum laude), micro-distillery co-founder, Sacramento-based. Profile corrected from earlier fabrication.',
 'Khanh tested Explorer mode, liked the relay content but wanted more story setup and meaningful choices. Suggested prologue and branching paths. Also noted DAVID could have more personality.',
 'resolved');

INSERT INTO governance_records (recordId, title, recordType, version, blockRef, description, content, iCardUrl, compliance, status) VALUES 
('GOV-TETRA-001', 'Tetrahedral Observer Model', 'governance_model', 'v1.0', 'Block398',
 'The Tetrahedral Observer is the foundational governance framework for iAAi Infrastructure Academy. It defines four operational bridges (ACAD, MEMORIAL, CHART ROOM, TRE) connected through a tetrahedral topology where each node observes and validates the others. The model ensures no single point of failure and maintains data integrity across the distributed system.',
 '{"bridges": ["ACAD (infra-acad-kuqzaex2.manus.space)", "MEMORIAL (nigelmemorial-ucmtq9dn.manus.space)", "CHART ROOM (xgrowthtrk-2a93yo5z.manus.space)", "TRE GAME (realityeng-epdhlkrn.manus.space)"], "principles": ["Distributed observation", "Cross-validation", "No single point of failure", "Immutable audit trail"], "nodeCount": 4, "topology": "tetrahedral"}',
 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663030220481/tetrahedral-observer-icard.webp',
 'SAP-001 compliant', 'active'),

('GOV-SAP-001', 'System Assurance Protocol (SAP-001)', 'protocol', 'v1.0', 'Block395',
 'SAP-001 is the master governance protocol for all iAAi documents and data. Key requirements: (1) Never overwrite legal documents — always version and add alongside, (2) All shared documents are legal evidence, (3) Data integrity is critical — police oversight applies, (4) Every document must be anchored to S3/CDN before distribution.',
 '{"rules": ["Never overwrite — version and add alongside", "All shared documents are legal evidence", "Police oversight on data integrity", "Anchor to S3/CDN before distribution", "SHA-256 hash verification for evidence chain"], "violations": ["Block405: Files created in sandbox only, not anchored to CDN before sharing"], "enforcement": "Automatic + manual audit"}',
 NULL,
 'Active — enforced', 'active'),

('GOV-GDP-002', 'Game Design Parameters v2.1', 'design_document', 'v2.1', 'Block404',
 'Complete game design specification including tri-mode architecture, relay system, FITS assessment, D20 mechanics, engagement layer, competitive landscape analysis (Section 15), and Node 018 response (Section 16).',
 '{"sections": 16, "modes": 3, "relays": 12, "webs": 5, "inventions": "91+", "xpCap": "24M", "assessmentSystems": ["FITS", "D20"], "engagementFeatures": ["sounds", "particles", "streaks", "milestones", "summaries"]}',
 NULL,
 'SAP-001 compliant', 'active');

logs: ERROR 1054 (42S22) at line 1: Unknown column 'status' in 'field list'
